title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.640 - Proceedings when setoff is pleaded
text:
521.640.  Proceedings when setoff is pleaded. — When the petition alleges a setoff, or other collateral avoidance of the cause of action, the plaintiff may answer the same, as in ordinary actions; and, in default of such answer, judgment may be taken in like manner and with like effect as in ordinary actions.
(RSMo 1939 § 1502) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1338; 1919 § 1789; 1909 § 2358
